place: Plai Laem, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Organic-Modern Four-Bedroom Pool Villa - Plai Laem
blurb: A four-bedroom, two-storey pool villa in a private Plai Laem estate — organic-modern architecture in warm plaster, natural stone and timber, set into the Koh Samui hillside. Around 200 m² of living space with a private pool and a 63 m² terrace, on freehold Chanote land, twelve minutes from the airport. Under construction, from ฿20,900,000.
detail:
One of a pair of mirrored homes in an intimate, gated estate, this four-bedroom villa is wrapped in warm earthy plaster, natural stone and timber — an organic-modern design set among palms on a quiet Plai Laem hillside. Across two floors of roughly 200 m², floor-to-ceiling glass and deep, shaded terraces dissolve the line between living space and tropical garden.

The ground floor opens to an open-plan living and kitchen that flows out to a private swimming pool, a generous 63 m² terrace, a pool lounge, outdoor shower and a dedicated dining and barbecue zone. Above, four en-suite bedrooms — 4.5 bathrooms in all — each open to a private balcony, finished in a restrained, contemporary palette of warm neutrals.

The home sits within a private estate on freehold Chanote-title land, with planning permission granted and construction already underway. Considered, durable detailing runs throughout — rooftop solar, a pergola-shaded roof terrace, and a deep well installed on the plot for a reliable, independent water supply.

Offered off-plan, the villa is priced from ฿20,900,000, with an optional turnkey furniture package at ฿700,000. The estate lies about twelve minutes from Samui International Airport, with the beaches, dining and marinas of Plai Laem, Choeng Mon and Bophut close at hand.
